text.title: rag-eval-strategy Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules every application of rag-eval-strategy enforces.

rule.statement: Define numeric gates: MRR_min, faithfulness_min, latency_p95_max, cost_per_query_max. No 'good vibes' criteria.
rule.rationale: Without numeric gates, launch decisions slide.

rule.statement: Define three eval tiers: per-PR (fast 20-question set), per-release (full set, full Triad), weekly (sampled production drift check).
rule.rationale: Mixing speed and depth in one run wastes budget.

rule.statement: Sampling fraction and seed are explicit; never 'about 10%'. Reproducibility requires deterministic sampling.
Specify rollback criteria as inverse of launch gates (e.g., faithfulness drops by 0.05 absolute → rollback).
Strategy doc names a single owner and a revisit date (default 90 days).
rule.rationale: Ownerless strategies decay; revisit cadence prevents staleness.

rule.statement: Skip when there is no production target or shared team need.
rule.rationale: Stub rule referenced from 06-decision-tree.xml when none of the qualifying branches fire.
